creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hello,

I wanted to play around with the CT module, but unfortunately it doesn't work since it requires OpenSSL 1.0.2, which is not part of FreeBSD base. Compilation/building the module doesn't throw any errors/warnings, but if you load the module it fails due to a missing function in OpenSSL 1.0.1

Also see: https://github.com/grahamedgecombe/nginx-ct, which states the supported OpenSSL versions/forks are required.

Just thought you should know.

Best regards,
Ralf
